historical_parallel: The Peloponnesian War (431-404 BC) mirrors the systemic friction of Artemis, reflecting a period of societal upheaval and conflict over resources.
era_resolution: The era was marked by the use of diplomacy and strategic alliances, although ultimately resulting in the decline of Athens.
modern_resolution: A Modern UESP Resolution would involve the implementation of cutting-edge technologies such as AI-driven conflict resolution and sustainable energy harvesting to mitigate the effects of systemic friction and promote global cooperation.

biblical_tie.context: They will beat their swords into plowshares and their spears into pruning hooks. Nation will not take up sword against nation, nor will they train for war anymore.

protocol: UESP Protocol 7: Artemis Stabilization Initiative. Implement AI-driven conflict resolution and sustainable energy harvesting. Promote global cooperation and diplomacy to mitigate systemic friction.
